description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the elixir:latest Docker image with a global before_script that runs `mix local.rebar --force`, `mix local.hex --force`, and `mix deps.get`. Define the default test stage and a deploy stage. Add a `mix` job in the test stage that executes `script/test`. Add a `pages` job in the deploy stage that runs `script/docs`, publishes the `public/` directory as an artifact, and runs only on the master branch. Apply the before_script to all jobs.
